hero.description: We handle everything from finding suppliers to delivering products. Simple, fast, and reliable trade solutions for your business.

whyUs.title: What Makes Us Different
whyUs.subtitle: We don't just move goods. We negotiate better prices, ensure quality, and deliver faster than others.

negotiation.title: Expert Negotiation
negotiation.desc: Our team negotiates directly with factories to get you prices others can't match

quality.title: Quality First
quality.desc: We inspect every product personally before shipping. No surprises, no disappointments

speed.title: Fast & Reliable
speed.desc: From order to delivery in record time. We handle urgent shipments with ease

price.title: Best Value
price.desc: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. You always know what you're paying for

services.title: Everything You Need
services.sourcingDesc: Find the right suppliers and products for your business
services.inspectionDesc: Professional inspection before shipping to ensure quality
services.warehousingDesc: Secure warehousing in China until you're ready to ship
services.shippingDesc: Air, sea, and land shipping options to your destination
services.customsDesc: We handle all paperwork and customs clearance
services.logisticsDesc: Complete supply chain management from start to finish

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you need. We'll handle the rest.

quote.title: Get Your Free Quote
quote.subtitle: 3 simple steps to start your order

step1.title: What do you need?
step1.subtitle: Select the service that matches your needs

step3.title: Tell us more
step3.subtitle: Share details about what you're looking for
step3.placeholder: Example: I'm looking for electronics suppliers in Shenzhen. Need 500 units with custom branding. Shipping to Dubai...

success.title: Request Sent!
success.message: We'll contact you within 24 hours with your personalized quote.

workflow.title: Shipment Handling Process
workflow.subtitle: Clear operational workflow from supplier to destination

supplier.title: Supplier Confirmation
supplier.desc: Verify production capability, export license status, and order readiness before scheduling pickup

intake.title: Warehouse Intake
intake.desc: Receive cargo at our facility, document condition, verify quantities, and assign tracking references

inspection.title: Inspection Handling
inspection.desc: Physical verification against specifications, packaging check, and quality documentation

dispatch.title: Export Dispatch
dispatch.desc: Complete export documentation, customs filing, and coordinate carrier handoff

coordination.title: Multi-supplier Coordination
coordination.desc: Consolidate cargo from multiple suppliers into single shipments when beneficial

documentation.title: Documentation Preparation
documentation.desc: Prepare commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates, and customs paperwork

tracking.title: Shipment Tracking
tracking.desc: Monitor movement from warehouse intake through final delivery confirmation

consumer.title: Consumer Goods
consumer.desc: Apparel, accessories, home products, and personal items
consumer.capabilities: Multi-SKU consolidation, quality sampling, packaging compliance

electronics.title: Electronics
electronics.desc: Devices, components, accessories, and consumer technology
electronics.capabilities: ESD protection, battery compliance, fragile handling protocols

furniture.title: Furniture
furniture.desc: Indoor and outdoor furniture, fixtures, and home furnishings
furniture.capabilities: Assembly verification, damage prevention, volume optimization

industrial.title: Industrial Supplies
industrial.desc: Machinery parts, tools, hardware, and manufacturing inputs
industrial.capabilities: Technical specifications review, weight handling, hazmat screening

retail.title: Retail Products
retail.desc: Store supplies, display items, packaging, and promotional materials
retail.capabilities: Labeling requirements, bulk consolidation, seasonal scheduling

packaging.title: Packaging Materials
packaging.desc: Boxes, containers, labels, and shipping supplies
packaging.capabilities: Volume quotes, standard sizing, print verification

risk.title: How We Handle Risks
risk.subtitle: Operational approach to common trade challenges

supplier.title: Supplier Reliability
supplier.desc: Verification of export license, production capacity, and previous shipment history

accuracy.title: Cargo Accuracy
accuracy.desc: Physical count verification, specification matching, and quality sampling before export

documentation.title: Documentation Correctness
documentation.desc: Review of commercial invoices, HS codes, and required certificates for destination country

readiness.title: Shipment Readiness
readiness.desc: Packaging adequacy, labeling compliance, and carrier booking confirmation

prevention.title: Prevention Measures
items: Photo documentation of cargo condition at intake
Carrier booking confirmation 48 hours before pickup
Proactive communication of any delays or issues

case1.scope: 3 suppliers consolidated, FCL container, mixed consumer goods
case1.outcome: Delivered on schedule with all documentation correct

case2.scope: Electronics shipment, battery compliance handling, urgent delivery
case2.outcome: Shipped within 72 hours of warehouse intake

case3.scope: Rail to port, sea freight, customs brokerage included
case3.outcome: Cost-effective routing with reliable transit time

knowledge.title: For Traders
knowledge.subtitle: Practical information to help plan your shipments

shippingCosts.title: Understanding Shipping Costs
shippingCosts.desc: Factors that affect rates: weight, volume, route, season, and fuel adjustments

exportPrep.title: Preparing Goods for Export
exportPrep.desc: Packaging standards, labeling requirements, and documentation timelines

supplierTiming.title: Managing Supplier Timelines
supplierTiming.desc: Realistic production schedules, buffer time, and coordination workflows

shippingMethods.title: Choosing Shipping Methods
shippingMethods.desc: Air vs sea vs rail: cost, speed, and suitability for different cargo types

footer.tagline: Your direct line to China. We negotiate better prices, ensure quality, and deliver faster.
